title: poa alpina var. badensis
intro: Poa alpina var. badensis, also known as Alpine Meadow-grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Poa alpina var. badensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can be used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures or salves.
